name: SP1 叶王的红笔
desc: 2026 暑假特辑·独立系列 · 中考方向·陷阱猎人版 · 16 道自包含单选（形容词顺序/副词/时间介词/时态语态情态/非谓语/从句/反义疑问/反选题）。初中语法全专项只考命门。看图题与红笔翻案在纸卷上。

m5.q: 8. Ye Wang keeps ___ box of red pens on her desk.
m5.why: size-age-material → a small old wooden box。

m5.q: 9. The snake moved so quietly that we ___ noticed it at all.
10. ___ the end of this summer, she will have graded a thousand papers.
m5.why: by the end of…=到…为止，与将来完成 will have done 搭配。

m5.q: 11. Check your answers ___ you hand in the paper — it is too late afterwards.
m5.why: 后半句‘之后就晚了’锁定交卷之前 → before。

m5.q: 12. First she read the paper, and ___ she picked up the red pen.
13. She drank two ___ while grading the papers.
m5.why: two cups of tea，容器复数、tea 不可数不变。

m5.q: 14. If it ___ tomorrow, the summer party will be moved indoors.
m5.why: 主将从现 → 从句用 rains。

m5.q: 15. A strange thing ___ in the grading room last night.
m5.why: happen 不及物，主动一般过去 → happened。

m5.q: 16. The light in her room is still on. She ___ still be grading.
m5.why: 肯定推测 → must be(一定在…)。

m5.q: 17. She made the students ___ their answers twice before handing in.
m5.why: make sb do —— 使役动词后省去 to。

m5.q: 18. This is the room ___ she grades every paper.
m5.why: 先行词 room 表地点，从句不缺成分 → 关系副词 where。

m5.q: 19. She has never crossed out a right answer, ___?
m5.why: never 是否定词 → 反义疑问用肯定 has she。

m5.q: 20. 下列四句中只有一句有语法错误。选出【错误】的一句：
ops: There are many papers on the desk.
Each of us has a red pen.
m5.why: news 不可数、作单数 → The news is very exciting。

m5.q: 21. 下列四句中只有一句有语法错误。选出【错误】的一句：
ops: This paper is the more difficult of the two.
She is taller than any girl in her class.
He runs faster than anyone else.
It is the most useful book I have ever read.
m5.why: 她自己也在班里，不能和自己比 → than any other girl。

m5.q: 22. She was ___ tired that she fell asleep on the desk.
m5.why: so + 形容词(tired) + that 从句。

m5.q: 23. ___ she is strict, she is never unfair to anyone.
m5.why: Though 引导让步状语从句。
